hints.text: Wide **fjords + jagged green mountains** rising straight from the water w/ rocky ridgelines (greener & more imposing than Iceland); **almost no trees**
Gen4 = **black pickup w/ a front antenna** (always blurred; Iceland's truck has no antenna); Gen3 = black car w/ a plain grey roof rack
Houses = wood w/ an above-ground **stone basement in a different colour**; roofs are **metal or grass (turf)**
**Faroese** (closest to Icelandic): Á Ð Í Ó Ú Ý Æ **Ø** — the Ø (vs Icelandic's É/Þ) is the tell
Bollards = small **wooden sticks painted yellow** (sometimes red on top); guardrails have **yellow reflectors** (unique in Northern Europe)
Directional signs yellow w/ a thin black border + metal frame (very like Iceland's)
**Tórshavn** = biggest (only place w/ 3+ floor buildings); **Klaksvík** = narrow N-S fjord; **Kirkjubøur** = black turf-roof houses + a church ruin
